mapper.insert: insert into community_station ( express_no, user_id, user_name, user_phone, user_room, express_company, station_status, storage_time, pick_time, operator, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark ) values ( #{expressNo}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{userPhone}, #{userRoom}, #{expressCompany}, #{stationStatus}, #{storageTime}, #{pickTime}, #{operator}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark} )
mapper.update: update community_station set express_no = #{expressNo}, user_id = #{userId}, user_name = #{userName}, user_phone = #{userPhone}, user_room = #{userRoom}, express_company = #{expressCompany}, station_status = #{stationStatus}, storage_time = #{storageTime}, pick_time = #{pickTime}, operator = #{operator}, create_by = #{createBy}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark} where id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from community_station where id in
#{id}
